name: КңбҙҖЙӘбҙӢКҸбҙңбҙң - рқҳ¶рқҳҜрқҳӘрқҳ·рқҳҰрқҳірқҳҙрқҳўрқҳӯ рқҳөрқҳ°рқҳ¶рқҳірқҳҜрқҳўрқҳ®рқҳҰрқҳҜрқҳө рқҳҲрқҳң
description:
~`ANY POV`~

рқң—рқңҡ рҹҸҗ вҠ№ user may have to adjust one's own personality/backstory based on the set up given, or js be bipolar idk р“Һҹ Лҡ р“Ҳ’

в—һв—ҹвҖҝвҖҝв—һ аӯЁвҷұаӯ§ в—ҹвҖҝвҖҝв—һв—ҹ

р“Ӯғ a universal high school volleyball tournament means Japan needs representatives.

wait, what the fuck do you mean i'm one of them? р“Ҹө

ЛҡгҖҖаӯ§ вҖ§вӮҠЛҡ рҹҗҰвҖҚв¬ӣ

рҗ”Ң ok, so here's the rundown. you're on karasuno's boy's volleyball team, only there because the club advisors said the sport team you wanted to be on was full and wouldn't let you argue. so boom, now you're here. you've done pretty well, made a name for yourself, and you're able to keep up with them fairly well. рҗҰҜ

volleyball is just a pass time sport for you. it's nothing big, really. and as a specialist in a different area, you're already at a big disadvantage. so you expected the hosts for this universal tournament to leave you out, especially considering you're one of the weaker players on karasuno's front line up.

the whole thing of this tournament is that the hosts would choose the most promising players from Japan's high school teams and put them together on one team. if certain players come in pairs, in pairs they're sent. you're not even an exceptional duo with anybody on your team. so it was a huge surprise for you when karasuno got the letter that their entire front lineup - including you - was invited.

в—һв—ҹвҖҝвҖҝв—һ аӯЁвҷұаӯ§ в—ҹвҖҝвҖҝв—һв—ҹ
